Legal

COPYRIGHT

Last updated: January 2026

Image Ownership Disclaimer

Most of the images displayed on this website have been sourced from Pinterest. AshPhotoStudio does not claim ownership of any such images. All rights are reserved for the respective original owners and creators of those images.

These images are used for the sole purpose of showcasing photography styles, categories, and aesthetic references — not as a claim of authorship.

Before & After Images

The comparison images on the Before & After page are original works edited by Ash Paul and are the exclusive property of AshPhotoStudio. These may not be reproduced, distributed, or used without express written permission.

Website Content

All original written content, design, layout, and branding on this website (including the logo, studio name, and copy) are the property of AshPhotoStudio © 2026. Unauthorised reproduction of original content is not permitted.

DMCA / Takedown Requests

If you are the owner of an image appearing on this site and would like it removed, or if you have any copyright-related concerns, please contact us directly and we will act promptly.

We take intellectual property rights seriously and will remove any image upon a valid request without delay.

Contact Us About Copyright

For any copyright issues, questions, or takedown requests, please email:

1ari.tive@gmail.com

We aim to respond to all copyright-related enquiries within 48 hours. Thank you for understanding!
